<<Healthy Habits for a Sugar-Free Life>>

To cut out sugar from your daily diet, start by reading [label] on food products. Replace sugary snacks with [fruit]. Limit sweetened drinks and opt for water instead.

* * *

Avoiding hidden sugars in [condiments] can help reduce intake. Check [ingredients] for added sugars. Make gradual changes for long-term success.

* * *

A balanced diet with whole foods supports this goal. Consult a nutritionist for personalized advice. Enjoy the benefits of a healthier lifestyle.
